rationale: Feature calls external service (Claude Code CLI via AI SDK provider) but has NO local domain entities. Chat messages are ephemeral React useState, not MST-persisted data. This is a UI-layer-only service integration - all code stays in apps/web. No need for packages/state-api domain abstractions since there's nothing to abstract.
correction: Corrected from hybrid to service: Initial assessment assumed local domain state would need MST persistence. Evidence shows state is ephemeral UI only (React useState). No sync pattern needed since there's no local domain to sync.
